text:
The department shall:

(1) make a loan instead of a grant whenever feasible under this subchapter; and

(2) carefully consider making a loan instead of a grant for an improvement that produces revenue.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 21. Admin. of Aeronautics
##### § 21.102 — Loan Preferred

The department shall:

    (1) make a loan instead of a grant whenever feasible under this subchapter; and

    (2) carefully consider making a loan instead of a grant for an improvement that produces revenue.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: make a loan instead of a grant whenever feasible under this subchapter; and
carefully consider making a loan instead of a grant for an improvement that produces revenue.
